title: Sparkweave Engine
description: Library to share code and functionality between projects
body:
Sparkweave is a modding library to share code and functionality between all my mods.

---
⚠ THIS IS A LIBRARY; IT DOES NOT DO ANYTHING BY ITSELF ⚠
---

### Current Features:

- registration helpers
- GUI utilities
- package context annotations
- automatic loading of environment variables from a `.env` file
##### also see [the api package](https://github.com/Up-Mods/Sparkweave/tree/HEAD/Common/src/main/java/dev/upcraft/sparkweave/api)
